subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion and intimate confidant of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter hath arrived, and in these days I am resolved to journey unto America [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم و همدم و ندیم عبدالبهاء نامه رسید در این روزها مصمم حرکت امریکا
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @power of prayer, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
